data.name: KINGDOM HORNY
data.detailed_description:
The game has a minimum of boring scenes and solid porn scenes. It will definitely not be boring.

In the game you will find:

- One-handed play

- Sexy stories with videos and pictures

- 5 pretty ladies who are hungry for sex

- Achievements that are easy to unlock

- Gallery

Go on an exciting trip where you will get a huge dose of sex!

data.short_description: KINGDOM HORNY is a visual novel for adults in a medieval setting. There is a lot of sex and dangerous adventures waiting for you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1100 MB 可用空間
